expected_subtasks.title: Test schema compatibility with PostgreSQL 16
expected_subtasks.description: Verify all queries and schemas work on v16

expected_subtasks.title: Set up staging environment with PostgreSQL 16
expected_subtasks.description: Create test environment for migration rehearsal

expected_subtasks.title: Rehearse migration on staging
expected_subtasks.description: Run full migration process on staging

expected_subtasks.title: Create rollback plan
expected_subtasks.description: Document steps to revert if migration fails

what_good_breakdown_looks_like: 5-6 subtasks with clear dependencies. Testing and rollback plan are critical.
acceptable_variation: May have 5-7 subtasks. Must include testing, rollback, and verification.
notes: Complex infrastructure task with zero-downtime requirement. Must include testing and rollback.
